creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
The current version wants to write to www/privatebin and seems to ignore /var/db/privatebin.

Release 1.3.1 does not seem to have this issue.

While here, fix some portlint issues

* trailing spaces in pkg-descr
* move USES= up in Makefile

If maintainer wishes, I am happy to commit these changes as I have them staged in my working directory.
